allow: Bash(sqlite3 /homeassistant/home-assistant_v2.db "SELECT id, statistic_id, unit_of_measurement FROM statistics_meta WHERE statistic_id LIKE '%whole_home_energy%' OR statistic_id LIKE '%energy_current_consumption%' OR statistic_id LIKE '%home_energy_meter%' OR statistic_id LIKE '%daily_energy%' OR statistic_id LIKE '%panel_%_energy%';")
